framework.reason: Retention window is 90d idle then hard-purge; soft delete enables the transitional phase.

foundation.reason: Every subscription create + revoke audit-logged. Device tokens themselves NEVER audit-logged (restricted tier).

tenancy.reason: Push tokens are per-application (a coach's iOS token for the coach app is distinct from their same-device token for the parent app).

push_subscription.notes: NO HasVersions (device tokens don't need rollback — revoke + re-register instead). NO Searchable (secret material). NO Importable/Exportable (regulatory: device tokens shouldn't leave the platform).
